name: zyx1121
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by zyx1121.

plugins.name: scriptorium
plugins.description: Self-maintained LLM wiki for teams. PostgreSQL + MCP-over-HTTP. Based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

plugins.name: utils
plugins.description: Self-growing personal CLI toolbox. Hooks observe ad-hoc scripts and propose new commands; the CLI grows where it's actually used.

plugins.name: baogan
plugins.description: Three Taiwan-flavored personalities (professor / responsibility / folk) with L0–L4 failure escalation. The 4th layer — the one that won't let your agent give up. Inspired by tanweai/pua.

plugins.name: quant
plugins.description: Taiwan-stock swing-trading specialist — 1–4 week holds, agent-based decisions, lives on outpost via Telegram. The 7th layer (operators / 操作員) — the first vertical that actually does the work.
